cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Savitha ji, this is Ramesh from Standard Chartered Bank. Your car loan application has been approved, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, thank you so much, Ramesh ji. I'm really happy to hear that. What's the next step, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We need to coordinate with the car dealership to disburse the loan amount. Can you please confirm the dealership's name and your contact person there, Savitha ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, it's Mahindra First Choice, and my contact person is Rohan. He's been really helpful, haan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, Savitha ji. I'll make sure to get in touch with Rohan and finalize the details. We'll disburse the loan amount within the next 3 working days, thik hai?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 60s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A bank agent calls a customer who applied for a car loan to inform them that their loan has been approved and to coordinate the disbursement process with the car dealership.
